subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-14
subcodes.first_line: In spite of all these persecutions and afflictions, the Cause of God triumphed and the Covenant of God gained influence.
subcodes.first_line_orig: با وجود این ظلمها و بلاها امر الله غالب و عهد الله نافذ گردید حتی هیئت و اعضآء تفتیش
subcodes.subjects: @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital
